_comment: Mutation testing scoped to the security perimeter — shell allowlist, input sanitiser, log scrubber. Whole-repo mutation testing is too slow on this 3000+ test suite; the perimeter is where weak assertions matter most. Run via `npm run test:mutation`.
_thresholds_comment: Baseline 76.39 captured 2026-04-29 (scrub 94.12, shell 77.35, sanitize 66.67). break=70 leaves ~6 pts of headroom for noise; ratchet up as the perimeter tests strengthen.
